allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|xampp|laragon|wamp" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "php" -ArgumentList "artisan", "serve", "--port=8001" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\laragon\\www\\belajar-laravel - web" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\laragon\\www\\belajar-laravel - web"; php artisan serve --port=8001 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $output = Receive-Job $job; $output | Select-Object -First 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($routerPath = "$env:TEMP\\laravel-router.php"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param\($r\) php -S 127.0.0.1:8001 $r } -ArgumentList $routerPath; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Receive-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($resp.StatusCode\) - Content length: $\($resp.Content.Length\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
PowerShell($routerPath = "$env:TEMP\\laravel-router.php"; Start-Process -FilePath "php" -ArgumentList "-S", "127.0.0.1:8002", $routerPath -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object Id, HasExited)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Laragon port 80: HTTP $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Port 80: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://belajar-laravel-web.test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Virtual host: HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Virtual host: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "php" -ArgumentList "artisan", "serve", "--port=8000" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\laragon\\www\\belajar-laravel - web" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; "PID: $\($proc.Id\), HasExited: $\($proc.HasExited\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - length: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
